calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing For Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award
Off Calendar Jan-23-2018 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES:

No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER 3D ROBOTICS, INC.'s Notice Of Hearing For Petition To Confirm Contractual Arbitration Award.

Petitioner 3D Robotics Inc's petition to confirm arbitration award is off calendar per request of the moving party.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, mtorreano@sftc.org, Reported. (D302/HK)
